source_document_title: i.MX RT1060: Crossover MCU with Arm Cortex-M7
notes: NXP product-family capability diagram with categorized columns, pastel section groups, and many repeated horizontal feature blocks.
Includes system control, internal memory, power management, main CPU platform, multimedia, external memory, connectivity, ADC/DAC, and security sections.
Useful for validating section headers, table-like block groups, dashed availability boxes, color-coded capability domains, bottom legends, and diagrams with almost no explicit connection routing.
